name: cogni-consulting
description: Double Diamond consulting orchestrator. Guides engagements through Discover, Define, Develop, Deliver phases by dispatching to insight-wave plugins (research, trends, portfolio, claims) at the right moment. Vision-first, method-aware, phase-gated. Includes Lean Canvas authoring via business-model-hypothesis, and lightweight how-might-we engagements for bounded challenges (workshop design, process improvement, team exercises) using guided ideation.
